mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, price, img, abv, order_count FROM t_product ORDER BY id

SELECT id, name, type, price, img, abv, order_count FROM t_product
type = #{type}
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
ORDER BY price ASC, id ASC ORDER BY price DESC, id ASC ORDER BY name ASC, id ASC ORDER BY order_count DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_product (name, type, price, img, abv, order_count) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{price}, #{img}, #{abv}, COALESCE(#{orderCount}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE t_product SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, price = #{price}, img = #{img}, abv = #{abv}, order_count = #{orderCount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, price, img, abv, order_count FROM t_product ORDER BY order_count DESC, id ASC LIMIT 12
SELECT id, name, type, price, img, abv, order_count FROM t_product WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
